pipeline.title: 用 I'm [verb-ing] 描述正在做的事

items.zh: 你能等一会吗？我正在忙。
items.answer: Can you wait? I'm working right now.

pipeline.title: I'm [verb-ing] at the moment 句式操练

items.answer: I'm listening to music on the bus.

items.zh: 我正在沙发上坐着看电视。
items.answer: I'm watching TV on the sofa.

pipeline.title: right now 一词多句

patterns.chunk: What are you doing right now?

items.answer: What are you doing right now?
Right now, I'm taking a break.
Right now, I'm thinking about you.
Right now, I'm learning a new dish.

pipeline.title: at the moment 一词多句

items.answer: I'm doing nothing at the moment.
At the moment, I'm learning to drive.
At the moment, he is sleeping.
At the moment, it's raining outside.
Are you free at the moment?
Are you using the computer at the moment?
Are you waiting for someone at the moment?

pipeline.title: currently 一词多句

items.answer: Currently, I'm reading a good book.
Currently, he is looking for a new job.

pipeline.title: 从此刻动作到此刻状态逐步扩展

levels.label: 加时间
levels.en: I'm eating lunch right now. I'm quite busy at the moment.
levels.zh: 我正在吃午饭。我此刻很忙。
levels.highlight: I'm quite busy at the moment.

levels.label: 加反问
levels.en: I'm eating lunch right now. I'm quite busy at the moment. What are you doing?
levels.zh: 我正在吃午饭。我此刻很忙。你在做什么？

pipeline.title: 用 He's / She's [verb-ing] 描述第三人称正在做的事

items.answer: He is waiting for the bus.
He is sitting on the chair.
She is standing near the door.
He is wearing a blue shirt.
She is carrying a big bag.
He is looking for his keys.

pipeline.title: [subject] is [verb-ing] in/on/at [place] 句式操练

items.answer: He is running in the park.
She is sitting on the sofa.
The baby is sleeping in the bed.
He is standing at the door.
They are dancing in the kitchen.

pipeline.title: wearing 一词多句

items.answer: He is wearing a blue shirt.
She is wearing a red dress.
She is wearing a white T-shirt.

pipeline.title: looking 一词多句

items.answer: He is looking for his keys.
She is looking for her phone.
She is looking out the window.
He is looking at the menu.

pipeline.title: sitting / standing 一词多句

items.answer: He is sitting on the chair.
She is sitting next to me.
A cat is sitting on the windowsill.
He is standing at the door.
She is standing outside waiting for you.

pipeline.title: 描述他/她此刻的样子逐步扩展

levels.label: 加穿着
levels.en: He's sitting on the sofa. He's wearing a blue shirt.
levels.zh: 他正坐在沙发上。穿着一件蓝衬衫。

levels.label: 加找东西
levels.en: He's sitting on the sofa. He's wearing a blue shirt. He's looking for his phone.
levels.zh: 他正坐在沙发上。穿着一件蓝衬衫。正在找手机。

pipeline.title: 用 I usually...but today I'm... 对比习惯与此刻

items.zh: 我通常走路去上班，但今天我坐公交。
items.answer: I usually walk to work, but today I'm taking the bus.

items.zh: 我通常7点起床，但今天我8点起的。
items.answer: I usually get up at 7, but today I got up at 8.

items.zh: 我一般在家做饭，但今天我出去吃。
items.answer: I normally cook at home, but today I'm eating out.

items.zh: 通常我喝咖啡，但今天我喝茶。
items.answer: Usually I drink coffee, but today I'm drinking tea.
I'm working from home this week.

items.zh: 这个暂时的——下周就回去了。
items.answer: It's temporary — I'll go back next week.

items.zh: 我一般不开车，但此刻我在开车。
items.answer: I generally don't drive, but right now I'm driving.

pipeline.title: I usually [verb] but today/right now I'm [verb-ing] 对比操练

items.zh: 我通常走路，但今天我在开车。
items.answer: I usually walk, but today I'm driving.

items.zh: 我通常在家吃，但今天我在外面吃。
items.answer: I usually eat at home, but today I'm eating out.

items.zh: 我通常看电视，但此刻我在看书。
items.answer: I usually watch TV, but right now I'm reading.

items.zh: 我通常早睡，但今晚我在熬夜。
items.answer: I usually sleep early, but tonight I'm staying up late.

items.zh: 这周我一般很忙，但现在我休息一下。
items.answer: I'm usually busy this week, but right now I'm taking a break.

pipeline.title: still 一词多句

items.answer: Are you still angry with me?

pipeline.title: anymore 一词多句

items.answer: I don't do that job anymore.

patterns.chunk: Do you still ___ or not anymore?

items.answer: Do you still live in Beijing or not anymore?
Do you still exercise or not anymore?
Do you still talk to her or not anymore?

pipeline.title: temporary / for now 一词多句

items.answer: This is just a temporary arrangement.
I have no plans for now.

items.zh: 不是永久的，只是暂时的。
我暂时休息一下，不是永远不回来了。
items.answer: I'm taking a break for now, not forever.
This is only a temporary problem.

pipeline.title: 从习惯到例外逐步扩展

levels.label: 加例外
levels.en: I usually walk to work, but today I'm taking the bus.
levels.zh: 我通常走路去上班，但今天坐公交。
levels.highlight: but today I'm taking the bus.

levels.label: 加原因
levels.en: I usually walk to work, but today I'm taking the bus because it's raining.
levels.zh: 我通常走路去上班，但今天坐公交，因为下雨了。

pipeline.title: 用 I'm [adj] 描述此刻状态
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 我此刻很忙/有空/准备好了/...

items.zh: 我这个周末要去看父母。
items.answer: I'm visiting my parents this weekend.
I'm starting a new job next week.

pipeline.title: Are you [adj]? — Yes/No, I'm [state] 状态问答操练

items.zh: 你忙吗？——是的，我正在工作。
items.answer: Are you busy? — Yes, I'm working right now.

items.zh: 你有空吗？——有，我现在没事。
items.answer: Are you free? — Yes, I'm doing nothing now.

items.zh: 你准备好了吗？——还没有，再等一分钟。
items.answer: Are you ready? — Not yet, just one more minute.
Are you free tonight? — Yes, I am.
Are you tired? — A little, but I'm okay.

pipeline.title: busy 一词多句

items.answer: I'm too busy to take a break.

items.zh: 他太忙了，没时间接电话。
items.answer: He's too busy to answer the phone.
Don't be too busy. Take care.

pipeline.title: ready 一词多句

items.zh: 我准备好尝试新事物了。
items.answer: I'm ready to try something new.

pipeline.title: almost / just 一词多句
从状态到计划逐步扩展

levels.label: 加时间
levels.en: I'm busy right now, but I'm free tonight.
levels.zh: 我现在很忙，但今晚有空。

levels.label: 加提议
levels.en: I'm busy right now, but I'm free tonight. Are you free too? Let's meet!
levels.zh: 我现在很忙，但今晚有空。你也有空吗？我们见面吧！
levels.highlight: Are you free too? Let's meet!

pipeline.title: 用 rarely / hardly ever / once a week 等描述频率
pipeline.chunk: rarely / hardly ever / once a week / ...
pipeline.chunkMeaning: 很少/几乎从不/每周一次/...

items.answer: I visit my parents twice a month.
I go jogging every other day.

items.zh: 大多数时候我在家做饭。
items.answer: Most of the time, I cook at home.
I go there from time to time.
I think about it every single day.
He talks about football all the time.
I don't go to the cinema often.

pipeline.title: How often do you [verb]? — [frequency] 频率问答操练

items.zh: 你多久锻炼一次？——每周两次。
items.answer: How often do you exercise? — Twice a week.

items.zh: 你多久旅行一次？——一年一次。
items.answer: How often do you travel? — Once a year.

items.zh: 你多久看电影一次？——很少。
items.answer: How often do you watch movies? — Rarely.

items.zh: 你多久吃一次快餐？——几乎从不。
items.answer: How often do you eat fast food? — Hardly ever.

items.zh: 你多久给父母打电话？——每天。
items.answer: How often do you call your parents? — Every single day.

pipeline.title: once / twice / every other 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: once a week / twice a month / every other day
pipeline.vocabMeaning: 一周一次/一月两次/每隔一天

items.answer: I go to the supermarket once a week.
I exercise three times a week.

items.zh: 你多久打扫一次？——每周一次。
items.answer: How often do you clean? — Once a week.
I visit my parents twice a month.
I brush my teeth twice a day.
I go jogging every other day.
I wash my hair every other day.
Do you come every other day?

pipeline.title: rarely / hardly ever 一词多句

items.answer: Do you stay up late? — Hardly ever.
Do you eat sweets? — Not often.

pipeline.title: all the time / from time to time 一词多句
pipeline.vocabWord: all the time / from time to time

items.answer: He checks his phone all the time.
I think about it all the time.
I go there from time to time.
I miss home from time to time.
It's okay to eat sweets from time to time.

items.zh: 大多数时候我在家做饭。
items.answer: Most of the time, I cook at home.
He is right most of the time.

items.zh: 大多数时候这里很安静。
items.answer: It's quiet here most of the time.

pipeline.title: 从频率问句到对比描述逐步扩展

levels.label: 加回答
levels.en: How often do you exercise? — Twice a week. I go jogging every other day.
levels.zh: 你多久锻炼一次？——每周两次。我每隔一天去慢跑。
levels.highlight: Twice a week. I go jogging every other day.

levels.label: 加对比
levels.en: How often do you exercise? — Twice a week. But I rarely eat junk food, and I hardly ever drink soda.
levels.zh: 你多久锻炼一次？——每周两次。但我很少吃垃圾食品，几乎不喝汽水。
levels.highlight: But I rarely eat junk food, and I hardly ever drink soda.

pipeline.title: 在习惯与进行时之间切换
pipeline.chunk: I usually ... but right now I'm ...

items.zh: 我通常7点起床，但现在我还在睡觉。
items.answer: I usually get up at 7, but right now I'm still sleeping.

items.zh: 他通常走路去上班，但此刻他正坐公交。
items.answer: He usually walks to work, but right now he's taking the bus.

items.zh: 你通常在做什么？但现在你在做什么？
items.answer: What do you usually do? But what are you doing now?

items.zh: 描述一下这个场景——发生了什么？
items.answer: Describe the scene — what is happening?

items.zh: 你能叙述一下正在发生什么吗？
items.answer: Can you narrate what is going on?

items.zh: 我注意到你换了新发型。
items.answer: I notice you changed your hairstyle.
Can you describe it in detail?

pipeline.title: [subject] is [verb-ing] but usually [subject] [verb] 综合对比操练

items.zh: 他此刻在看书，但通常他看电视。
items.answer: He is reading right now, but usually he watches TV.

items.zh: 她此刻在喝咖啡，但通常她喝茶。
items.answer: She is drinking coffee right now, but usually she drinks tea.

items.zh: 我此刻在开车，但通常我坐公交。
items.answer: I'm driving right now, but usually I take the bus.

items.zh: 他们此刻在休息，但通常他们这个时间在工作。
items.answer: They are resting right now, but usually they work at this time.

items.zh: 此刻在下雨，但通常这个季节很干燥。
items.answer: It's raining right now, but usually it's dry this season.

pipeline.title: describe 一词多句

items.answer: Can you describe what you see?

items.zh: 你能描述一下那个人吗？
你能描述一下当时的情况吗？
描述一下你的日常生活。
我不需要细节，大概就好。
items.answer: I don't need details, just roughly.

pipeline.title: notice 一词多句

items.zh: 我注意到你换了新发型。
items.answer: I notice you changed your hair.

items.zh: 我注意到你今天很开心。
items.answer: I notice you are very happy today.

items.zh: 你注意到有什么不同吗？

items.answer: I didn't notice you came in.

items.zh: 你注意到了吗？——没有，我没注意。
items.answer: Did you notice? — No, I didn't notice.

pipeline.title: switch / happen 一词多句

items.zh: 让我们从现在时切换到过去时。
items.answer: Let's switch from present to past.
I don't know what is happening.

items.zh: 我在两种语言之间切换。

pipeline.title: 综合描述一个场景逐步扩展

levels.label: 描述动作
levels.en: He is sitting at a table. He is drinking coffee.
levels.zh: 他正坐在桌边。在喝咖啡。

levels.label: 加习惯对比
levels.en: He is sitting at a table, drinking coffee. Usually he drinks tea, but today he wanted coffee.
levels.zh: 他正坐在桌边喝咖啡。通常他喝茶，但今天他想喝咖啡。
levels.highlight: Usually he drinks tea, but today he wanted coffee.

levels.label: 加背景
levels.en: He is sitting at a table, drinking coffee. Usually he drinks tea, but today he wanted coffee. I notice the background is quiet and relaxing.
levels.zh: 他正坐在桌边喝咖啡。通常他喝茶但今天想喝咖啡。我注意到背景很安静放松。
levels.highlight: I notice the background is quiet and relaxing.
